name: Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt into a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Stir in the vanilla extract until just combined.
6. Gently fold in the chopped blueberries (reserve some for garnish).
7. Divide batter evenly among greased muffin tins.
8. Sprinkle 2 teaspoons of granulated sugar on top of each muffin.
9. Bake for 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Turn off and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing from the pan to wire rack to cool completely.
